policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: ough measurement of Scope 1 to Scope 3. To effectively achieve carbon neutrality, KEPCO and KEPCO Group companies are setting and implementing step-by- step GHG reduction targets and action strategies in line with national carbon neutrality plans, such as the Nationally Determined Contribution (NDC) and the Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand. In this regard, KEPCO and KEPCO Group companies will establish a foundation for carbon neutrality by increasing co-firing power generation, expanding renewable energy generation, and developing new technologies, all while actively reducing greenhouse gas emissions. GHG Emissions Company Name Category Unit 2021 2022 2023 KEPCO Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 799,047 706,644 649,356 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 210,820 221,251 221,275 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 220,002,720 214,273,227 194,127,327 KHNP Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 67,459 74,691 79,085 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 3,046,136 2,981,060 2,972,142 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq - - 239,215 KOEN Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 37,142,060 35,297,912 31,543,137 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 86,171 87,020 99,645 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 12,409,214 13,036,146 12,380,010 KOMIPO Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 32,979,587 31,747,702 31,170,642 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 113,546 127,504 139,411 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 9,287,047 6,789,841 6,601,366 KOWEPO Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 33,198,352 29,970,540 29,059,648 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 159,888 188,693 237,994 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 6,668,715 6,232,383 3,446,586 KOSPO Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 34,353,892 35,216,541 26,587,843 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 103,968 113,942 162,145 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 7,501,483 7,816,371 6,709,112 EWP Scope 1 (direct emissions) tCO2eq 32,711,636 29,091,757 27,103,040 Scope 2 (indirect emissions) tCO2eq 96,685 63,859 72,467 Scope 3 (other emissions) tCO2eq 10,759,573 6,384,828 6,171,228 Strengthening Air Pollutant Management KEPCO and KEPCO Group companies have constructed and operated environmental pollution prevention facilities such as flue gas desulfurization equipment, electrostatic precipitators, and denitrification facilities in power generation plants to reduce emissions of air pollutants such as sulfur oxides (“SOx”), nitrogen oxides (“NOx”), and total
